paragraphs.text: I strongly support the EU Digital Fairness Act. I am tired of tech giants like Apple, Google, or any other company telling me what I can and cannot do with a product that I own. When I buy a smartphone or computer, it is my property. I should be free to install any app I want, from any source I choose, or even replace the operating system entirely. No company should have the power to dictate how I use something I purchased. If I want to customize it, modify it, or even destroy it, that should be my right. Ownership must mean freedom, not control by corporations. This would greatly help consumers rights and smaller businesses to enter this insanely controlled market.
